title: Making an Appointment 预约挂号
scene: Lily打电话给医院预约看病。

lines.en: Good morning. This is City Hospital. How can I help you?
lines.zh: 早上好。这里是市医院。请问有什么可以帮您？

lines.en: Hi. I want to make an appointment with Dr. Wang.
What day would you like to come?
Dr. Wang is available at ten in the morning.
Ten o'clock is perfect. Thank you.
Can I have your name and phone number?
lines.zh: 请问您的姓名和电话号码？

lines.en: My name is Lily. My number is 555-1234.
Please arrive fifteen minutes early to register.
lines.zh: 请提前十五分钟到挂号。

lines.en: I will. Thank you very much!
